title: Diamond to Malachite
description: This texture pack turns DIAMOND textures to MALACHITE!
body:
![Title/Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/BQCgKbZK/diamondtomalachitetitle.png)

This texture pack turns all things diamond to MALACHITE! Which is a jade green gemstone. #

Here's some of the features: ![Items](https://i.postimg.cc/zDCwsvgx/items.png) ![Armor](https://i.postimg.cc/Y26N50WX/armor.png) ![Blocks](https://i.postimg.cc/rsNSxZTG/blocks.png) **

Anything gone wrong or looks off? Let me know about it in the [curseforge comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/diamond-to-malachite/comments)!** **

Made by TeamChar1ie (me)** **

Check out my other projects [Here](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)!**
